stories.headline: Ranveer & Deepika Welcome Baby Girl — Dua Padukone Singh
stories.summary: Bollywood's power couple Ranveer Singh and Deepika Padukone welcomed their first child, daughter Dua Padukone Singh, in September 2024. The family has been keeping a low profile, with both stars selectively taking projects post-parenthood.

stories.headline: Hrithik Roshan Signs Quirky Comedy 'Mess' with Prime Video
stories.summary: Hrithik Roshan is set to star in 'Mess,' a quirky comedy film for Prime Video, marking a fun departure from his action-hero image. Filming begins mid-2026.

stories.headline: Vicky Kaushal's Chhaava Crosses ₹850 Cr — His Biggest Hit Ever
stories.summary: Vicky Kaushal's Chhaava became one of the biggest Bollywood hits of 2025, crossing ₹850 crore worldwide. The actor, who married Katrina Kaif in 2021, is now firmly among Bollywood's A-listers.

stories.headline: Sonakshi Sinha & Zaheer Iqbal Celebrate 1-Year Anniversary
stories.summary: Bollywood couple Sonakshi Sinha and Zaheer Iqbal, who had a dreamy civil ceremony in June 2024, recently celebrated their first anniversary. The couple has been vocal about their love story on social media.

stories.headline: Salman Khan's 'Maatrubhumi' — War Epic on Galwan Valley Hero
stories.summary: Salman Khan stars in the ambitious war drama 'Maatrubhumi – May War Rest in Peace,' a tribute to the soldiers of the Galwan Valley standoff. Co-starring Chitrangada Singh, it's one of the most anticipated releases of 2026.

stories.headline: Arjun Rampal & Hansal Mehta Team Up for Web Series 'Billionaire'
stories.summary: Arjun Rampal is set to star in 'Billionaire,' a new web series directed by Hansal Mehta for Amazon MX Player. The series explores the rise of India's business elite against a backdrop of corporate intrigue.

stories.headline: Allu Arjun Makes History — First Telugu Actor to Win National Film Award for Hindi Film
stories.summary: Allu Arjun's iconic Pushpa 2 performance continues to earn global recognition. The film's success has cemented Allu Arjun as a pan-India superstar loved equally by Telugu and Hindi audiences.

stories.headline: Shah Rukh Khan's Next — 'King' with Son Aryan Khan Directing
stories.summary: SRK's upcoming action film 'King' features his real-life daughter Suhana Khan and is produced under Red Chillies Entertainment. The film is one of the most-anticipated Bollywood releases of 2026.
